name: AI-powered email management and summarization
description: Fetches recent emails from Gmail, uses Claude AI to organize, categorize, and prioritize them, then saves a structured summary report to Google Drive. Adapted from n8n's AI-powered email management and summarization workflow.

source.originalName: Effortless email management with AI-powered summarization & review

gmailListKey.description: Gmail connection key for listing emails

driveKey.description: Google Drive connection key for saving the summary report

searchQuery.description: Gmail search query to filter emails (default: last 24 hours)

maxEmails.description: Maximum number of emails to process (default: 20)

driveFolderId.description: Google Drive folder ID to save the summary report

code.source:
const messages = $.steps.fetchEmails.response.messages || [];
return { messageIds: messages.map(m => m.id).filter(Boolean).slice(0, 20) };

steps.name: Compile email metadata for AI analysis
Build Claude prompt for email organization
Save report to temp file for upload
